pageContext.name: Rick & Morty Series 2
pageContext.description: Mondo is back with Series 2 of the Rick and Morty Sixth Scale Figure Set! These new figures are huge and feature great neck, hand, and ankle articulation, as well as interchangeable heads and hands, and exciting accessories for any adventure.  Made out of PVC and ABS, Morty is approximately 8.5' tall (and weighs about 6.65 oz), and Meeseeks is about 11.5' tall (and 4.25 oz).
